name: segmented-pager
title: Segmented Pager
description: Swipeable tab pages with a header indicator (underline or pill) that tracks the scroll offset live, plus tap-to-page. The Twitter-profile pattern, done right.

variants.title: Underline
variants.description: An underline tracks the active tab. The default.

variants.title: Pill
variants.description: A pill tracks the active tab.
